name: flow-08-catalog-feed
description: T84 CatalogIndexer + T85 ListingFeedGenerator — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Count-only payload in FeedUpdated: { count: N }. Never include individual listing IDs.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: count-only-payload, no listing IDs in FeedUpdated event
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern for T84-T85: count-only event payload, catalog indexing pipeline
Break T84-T85 into: T84 index listing → T85 generate feed → emit FeedUpdated { count: N } (never { listingIds: [...] })
Generate catalog-indexer.service.ts — count-only payload in FeedUpdated: { count: N }. Never include individual listing IDs.
Named check validation: count_only_payload, no_listing_ids_in_event, feed_updated_shape
Score generated code 0-100 against T84-T85 iron rules: count-only payload, no entity IDs in events
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
